questionHtml: From the evidence provided by the graph, evaluate the reliability of these data.
markschemeHtml:
a. the data show clear trends
OR
a trend line could be drawn through these data
OR
there are no outliers ✔

b. the error bars/standard deviations shown
OR
the error bars/standard deviations vary with concentration ✔

c. sample size is unknown ✔

meta.title: From the evidence provided by the graph, evaluate the reliability of these data.
